name: slider
title: Slider
description: Continuous value selection along a track.

api.description: Value selection along a track. While scrubbing, the thumb and fill follow the pointer continuously; the committed value snaps to step.

props.name: step
props.description: Increment between committed values. The thumb still tracks the pointer smoothly while dragging.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value as an array (single thumb uses one entry). Values outside min to max are snapped to step and clamped for the fill and aria value.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the committed value changes. Receives stepped values while scrubbing and on keyboard input.

props.name: fillMotion
props.description: Optional motion inside the filled range while scrubbing. sparkle shows a light particle shimmer that adapts to light and dark themes. Set none to keep a static fill. Skipped when reduced motion is preferred.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-slider-sparkle
props.description: Brighter sparkle dots on the filled range while scrubbing.

props.name: --df-slider-sparkle-soft
props.description: Softer sparkle dots on the filled range while scrubbing.

props.name: --ring
props.description: Focus ring color via focus ring tokens.

props.name: --spacing-unit
props.description: Base unit for thumb size and sparkle dots.
